author: codex-agent

patch.value:
Implement the storage/runtime foundation for first-class plans.

Scope:
- Add built-in item type `Plan` while allowing agents to type `--type plan` through the existing case-insensitive resolver.
- Store Plan items in `.agents/pm/plans/` using the same TOON/front-matter/history mechanics as Epic, Feature, Task, etc.
- Add strongly typed plan metadata fields or equivalent normalized metadata support: `plan_mode`, `plan_scope`, `plan_harness`, `plan_steps`, `plan_decisions`, `plan_discoveries`, `plan_validation`, and `plan_resume_context`.
- Ensure Plan items participate in context/list/search/stats/validate/history like all other types.
- Search indexing must include plan scope, step text, decisions, discoveries, validation, dependencies, linked files/docs/tests, comments, notes, and learnings.

Research constraints from parent:
- Codex-style plans must be living, self-contained, validated, and resumable by a future stateless agent.
- Claude/Cursor-style plan modes require read-only planning before approval, reviewable steps, and progress/status updates.
- Reuse normal pm item history rather than inventing a sidecar plan artifact.

Implementation hints:
- Start at `src/types.ts` and `src/core/shared/constants.ts` for built-ins and folders.
- Confirm `src/core/item/type-registry.ts` continues resolving lowercase `plan` to `Plan`.
- Update settings/default folder initialization and any tests that assert exact built-in type lists or folder maps.
- Update help/contracts/completion/runtime schema expectations to include Plan.

Acceptance:
- `pm create --type Plan ...` and `pm create --type plan ...` both create Plan items.
- Plan items are written under the normal item store and have history streams.
- `pm contracts --command create --flags-only --json` includes Plan in runtime schema types.
- `pm search` can find Plan items by plan scope, step content, decisions, and linked item context.
- Focused tests cover built-in constants, type registry resolution, create/update behavior, search corpus, stats/context/list behavior, and history preservation.
Add built-in Plan item type and storage/search integration
Add Plan as a core pm item type with normal storage, history, search, contracts, and lowercase plan resolution.

Plan is a built-in item type; --type plan resolves to Plan; Plan uses normal item storage/history; Plan appears in contracts/help/completion/list/context/stats; search indexes plan-specific fields; focused tests and sandboxed dogfood pass.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Child task created from pm-v7dj after online research and duplicate-check evidence recorded on parent. This slice isolates built-in type/storage/search integration before dedicated pm plan commands.

message: Create Plan item type implementation slice

value.command: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/shared-constants-errors.spec.ts tests/unit/create-command.spec.ts tests/unit/update-command.spec.ts tests/unit/search-command.spec.ts tests/unit/stats-command.spec.ts tests/unit/completion-command.spec.ts tests/integration/help-runtime.spec.ts

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Research evidence: Plan should be a built-in type because it can reuse normal item storage, history hash chains, dependencies, search, list/context/stats, and linked files/docs/tests. Linked implementation files and focused regression command for future work.
